title: pedicularis elongata subsp. julica
intro: Pedicularis elongata subsp. julica is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae, commonly known as the lousewort. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use as a diuretic and to treat urinary problems due to its antispasmodic and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pedicularis elongata subsp. julica include its ability to help alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, often used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues.
